response.reasoning: Role requires 15 years experience, director-level IC, Bachelor's minimum (Master's/PhD preferred), AI expertise with demonstrated AI products/platforms, cloud expertise, and engineering leadership at strategic level. Candidate has ~16 years experience since 2009, meeting the tenure bar. Recent role at re:cinq touches AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but this is light exposure (started April 2025) rather than deep AI expertise. No demonstrated AI products at scale, no Master's/PhD in AI. Title is 'Senior/Staff Software Engineer' — not Principal/Director level. Cloud exposure is moderate (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) but not strategic cloud platform leadership. Strong craftsmanship, TDD, full-stack, and entrepreneurial signals via GISCollective founding. Lacks the executive-IC gravitas, recognized AI thought leadership, and demonstrated AI platform builds the role demands.
strengths: ~16 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Entrepreneurial track record founding and sustaining GISCollective open-source platform
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No Master's/PhD in AI and no recognized AI thought leadership or shipped AI products at scale
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director-level strategic IC
Cloud and AI strategy depth is shallow relative to a role advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC bar
Long tenure with entrepreneurial OSS founding

response.justification: The candidate meets the years-of-experience floor and shows craftsmanship, entrepreneurial drive, and emerging AI-agent tooling work, but the resume lacks the recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, and Principal/Director-level strategic influence this role centers on. Cloud strategy and AI platform leadership signals are thin, making this a weak fit for an AI-strategy Principal role though not an outright no given the breadth and recent direction.
